titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Jablah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Jablah

segments: ه عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن‌ موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عبد الجبّار، عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة.
arabic.text: ه عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن‌ موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عبد الجبّار، عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Jablah, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Abd Al-Jabbar, from Abdullah ibn Jablah.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Jablah, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Abd Al-Jabbar, from Abdullah ibn Jablah.
